answers.question: Please provide content for the cover letter/additional information field
answers.answer:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am writing to express my profound interest in the Chief Information Officer position in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia. With 27 years of progressive leadership in enterprise technology, including significant tenures as CIO/VP IT and Head of Technology at global organizations like DP World and Americana, my profile aligns exceptionally well with your requirements for a transformative technology leader.

My career has been defined by owning the full technology agenda, developing multi-year strategies across infrastructure, applications, data, integration, and security, and leading large-scale digital transformation programs. A core strength lies in major ERP modernization - from Oracle rollouts across 10+ countries at DP World to SAP S/4 HANA and Microsoft D365 implementations - directly addressing your requirement for ERP transformation leadership. I have deep fluency in cloud infrastructure, data and analytics, modern security architecture, and have held full accountability for cybersecurity postures including NCA and PDPL compliance frameworks.

As a digital and GenAI leader, I have consistently driven innovation with P&L accountability, underscoring the commercial instinct vital for an executive committee peer. I have managed technology budgets with the same rigor as a P&L, consolidated vendor estates, and driven cost optimization while maintaining service excellence. My experience establishing shared services, global delivery centers, and service-oriented IT operations with measurable uptime and response commitments aligns directly with your requirements.

My global exposure across UK, Europe, MENA, India, and Asia-Pacific provides relevant insights for a Saudi-based role. I hold a BE in Computer Science from Delhi University (a top-10 engineering institute in India), an Executive MBA from UBI Belgium, and an Executive Leadership qualification from IIM Ahmedabad. My professional certifications include PMP, PRINCE2, MSP Advanced Practitioner (one of only 9000 globally), and ITIL.

My accomplishments include the Nasscom India 3.0 IT Innovation award and over 20 CIO100 awards, reflecting my commitment to excellence and strategic impact. I am based in Dubai and available immediately to relocate to Riyadh.

Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to discussing how my vision and experience can contribute to your strategic goals.

Sincerely,
Mohit Mendiratta
mohit.mendiratta@gmail.com
+971.544.972.975
